meta.title: Developed By Jeys
meta.description: Portfolio landing page for JEYS, a back-end developer with frontend experience building reliable systems, business tools, and modern web applications.

hero.description: I build backend systems, databases, and business applications, with enough frontend experience to support complete web solutions.

proof.headline: Focused on backend, comfortable on the frontend.
items: Builds backend logic, databases, and application structure with long-term maintainability in mind.
Supports frontend work when needed using Vue.js, HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and jQuery.
Works with version control, team workflows, and business platforms like ServiceNow.

selectedWork.headline: Work built around business logic, stable systems, and maintainable code.

items.title: Business Management Platform
items.description: Developed backend features, database structure, and admin workflows for a system used to manage daily operations and reporting.

items.title: Internal Dashboard Tools
items.description: Built dashboard modules, data handling, and user access features for internal teams that needed clear visibility into operational data.

items.title: Service Workflow Solutions
items.description: Worked on backend integrations, workflow logic, and platform customization for service-based processes and team requests.

personalProjects.headline: Projects I built to learn, improve, and explore new ideas.

items.title: Captured by Jeys
description: Built using Codex AI, this project is a photo sharing platform that allows me to upload, organize, and share my photography work while learning how to integrate AI tools into a web application.
Includes mobile application features using React Native, and a web dashboard built with Laravel and React.js to manage photos and user interactions.

skills.headline: Core technologies and current strength areas.

goals.headline: Continuing to grow beyond my current backend focus.
goals.description: I am continuously exploring other programming languages and technologies to broaden my skill set, strengthen my adaptability, and grow into a more flexible full-stack developer.

process.headline: A practical approach to building backend-driven projects.

items.title: Discover
items.description: Understand the workflow, system requirements, and business needs before development starts.

items.title: Build
items.description: Develop the backend structure, connect data, and support frontend requirements where needed.

items.title: Improve
items.description: Refine performance, maintainability, and workflow efficiency based on testing and usage.

contact.headline: Looking for a backend developer who can also support frontend work?
contact.description: Available for backend-focused web projects, system improvements, and application support.
